steps.title: Identify the fit between principle and example
steps.content: The passage establishes that demonstration sports showcase sports related to the host country, then provides two examples: an Austrian sport and a French sport chosen in Austria and France respectively. The key signal is that these examples perfectly embody the stated purpose.

steps.title: Match the logical fit with a transition
steps.content:
”Fittingly” expresses that this outcome is appropriate given the stated purpose.

B and D signal contradiction where none exists, while C merely adds information.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
